generated_oml:
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for secure IoT device connectivity and MQTT protocol handling"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring, PredictiveAnalytics
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto for digital twin management and protocol adaptation"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring, Simulation
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for high-fidelity interactive visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualization
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering tools for automated transformation of BIM models into runtime artifacts with iterative policy improvement"
    DTDFVocab:enables Simulation, PredictiveAnalytics
]

instance RealTimeMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of environmental and operational data from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:provides IndoorTemperatureMonitoring, IndoorHumidityMonitoring, IlluminanceMonitoring
]

instance Simulation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building performance under various operational scenarios"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResults
]

instance PredictiveAnalytics : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy optimization, visual comfort adjustments, and health effect management"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight, HealthEffectManagementInsight
]

instance EnergyConsumptionOptimization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy consumption optimization service for facility management decisions"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationAction
]

instance VisualComfortManagement : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visual comfort management through lighting and shading adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAction
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analysis of non-visual health effects from environmental factors"
    DTDFVocab:provides HealthEffectAction
]

instance InteractiveVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of building data using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance IndoorTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for monitoring indoor temperature in the Living Lab building"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IndoorTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance IndoorHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for monitoring indoor humidity in the Living Lab building"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IndoorHumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance IlluminanceSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for measuring illuminance levels in the Living Lab building"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IlluminanceDataTransmitted
]

instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for monitoring CO2 concentration in the Living Lab building"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2DataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for detecting occupancy in the Living Lab building"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance IndoorTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IndoorTemperatureSensor
]

instance IndoorHumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IndoorHumiditySensor
]

instance IlluminanceDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IlluminanceSensor
]

instance CO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Sensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance IndoorTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time indoor temperature measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IndoorTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance IndoorHumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time indoor humidity measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IndoorHumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance IlluminanceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time illuminance measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IlluminanceDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance CO2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time CO2 concentration measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy detection data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for controlling HVAC system within Building Control Systems"
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for adjusting lighting systems in the building"
]

instance WindowBlindsController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for adjusting window blinds to manage visual comfort"
]

instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Living Lab case study building as the physical asset represented by the digital twin"
    base:contains IndoorTemperatureSensor, IndoorHumiditySensor, IlluminanceSensor, CO2Sensor, OccupancySensor, HVACActuator, LightingController, WindowBlindsController
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models enriched with device metadata for middleware integration, providing geometric, spatial, and functional characteristics of building components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringTools
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for optimizing energy consumption based on sensor data"
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for adjusting visual comfort through lighting and shading"
]

instance HealthEffectManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of non-visual health effects from environmental factors such as air quality and lighting"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting HVAC and lighting systems for energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VisualComfortAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting window blinds and lighting for visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance HealthEffectAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting ventilation and environmental controls for health effect management"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance IndoorTemperatureMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature monitoring data"
]

instance IndoorHumidityMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity monitoring data"
]

instance IlluminanceMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time illuminance monitoring data"
]

instance SimulationResults : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results of building performance scenarios"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of building performance data"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the digital twin and sent to Building Control Systems (BCS) actuators via Eclipse Hono and Ditto."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with no specific time intervals specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized DT Framework orchestrating bidirectional data exchange between physical assets and modular services via standardized extension points."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design, construction, operation, and refurbishment phases of the building lifecycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure interoperability and architectural soundness."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange protocols."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Interoperable with external systems via standardized extension points, but specific systems not detailed in the document."
]
